notes: Batch 17-D (57 entries) — tab_settings.rs settings descriptions all translated; update_environment_form.rs splits between UI text (Generating…, Repo(s), char counter, e.g. placeholders translated additively per precedent 01KQXQV12JH6P9KS1AA71R0P8S) and protocol/URL-key literals (github/docker host prefixes, txId query key, repos_dropdown_row_{index} position id) flagged telemetry_payload; one panic_message ('filtered indices non-empty'). settings_view/mod.rs flag IDs (Allow_Native_Wayland, Code_As_Default_Enabled, Quit_Warning_Modal, FeatureFlag.AgentView, Thinking_Display_*, Vim_*, Sync_All_Panes_In_Current_Tab, Session_Config_Tab_Config_Chip_Open, Log_Out_Warning_Modal, SSH_TMUX_WRAPPER_CONTEXT_FLAG deprecation msg, warp.settings_page crash tag) flagged telemetry_payload as protocol-key fallback; debug-mode ToggleSettingActionPair description_suffix args (recording mode, in-band generators for new sessions, debug network status, memory statistics) translated since they render as 'Enable {description_suffix}' in command palette. No search_terms entries in this batch. Glossary applied: tab→标签页, prompt→提示词(AI), Code Review kept English, Agent kept English, PR kept English, diff kept English, chip kept English.
